Om.description: Machine index assigned to each operation

notes: We add the implicit assumptions: there is at least one job and machine, processing times $p_{j,k} \ge 0$, and $Om$ encodes a valid JSSP instance. To be a valid JSSP instance, each job has exactly one operation assigned per machine.
EvoCut arXiv submissions `v1` cut EC3 has an ambiguous interpretation and is excluded.
